---
title: "Engineering in Development: Transport"
description: "Robin Lovelace and Andy Mcloughlin (2015). Engineering in Development: Transport. *Engineers Without Borders UK*."
date: "2015-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_engineering_2015"
citation-type: "book"
citation-type-label: "Book"
venue: "Engineers Without Borders UK"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Andy Mcloughlin"
abstract: "This work discusses the role of transport engineering in international development contexts. It emphasizes sustainable and equitable infrastructure solutions tailored for low- and middle-income country requirements."
---

**Type:** Book
**Venue:** Engineers Without Borders UK
**Year:** 2015

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This work discusses the role of transport engineering in international development contexts. It emphasizes sustainable and equitable infrastructure solutions tailored for low- and middle-income country requirements.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace and Andy Mcloughlin (2015). Engineering in Development: Transport. *Engineers Without Borders UK*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@book{lovelace_engineering_2015,
	address = {London},
	title = {Engineering in {Development}: {Transport}},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	abstract = {This work discusses the role of transport engineering in international development contexts. It emphasizes sustainable and equitable infrastructure solutions tailored for low- and middle-income country requirements.},
	publisher = {Engineers Without Borders UK},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin and Mcloughlin, Andy},
	year = {2015},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
